title: South Korea plans to train military as "drone warriors"
abstract: South Korea plans to train military as "drone warriors" may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform gene...
abstract_zh: 韩国军队要变身“无人机侠”了！不是武侠片，是真无人机！他们准备用精准制导的训练，让无人机成为战场新宠。这招“空降打击”，不仅解了燃眉之急，还把AI技术玩出了花！无人机侠们，准备起飞吧！
